author: jtraglia
content: More like an optimization for light clients. So yes, this is not important for devnet-0. But since I’ve already merged it, if for whatever reason we need another release for devnet0, it will be included in that.

content: Yeah seems very minor, curious what cl devs think. I think we could include it in devnet 0 but also don’t wanna keep pushing the start line

author: tersec
content: the main outcome I want to avoid is overlapping specs

author: tersec
content: i.e. maintaining multiple branches for alpha.5/6

author: tersec
content: so ok with doing it for neither devnet-0/1 or both devnet 0/1

author: barnabasbusa
content: I think we will have a chance to be agile in the coming days, so I'd just push for the new alpha 6 release and aim to have clients implement this tiny extra field.

content: But ideally the genesis handling issue should be resolved also

author: jtraglia
content: I don’t want to change specs right as everyone is getting things working. I’m leaning towards not doing anything until there’s a better reason to make a release.

content: I wish I had waited to merge that breaking change 😓
